pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent module path usage; while source/target works, release is preferred for JDK 21 migrations to avoid subtle module system issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 bytecode generation or module features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin version to a newer snapshot.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may have issues running tests on newer JDKs or lack support for newer test features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin version to a newer snapshot.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Failsafe versions may have issues running integration tests on newer JDKs.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Replace deprecated io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry with io.prometheus.metrics.model.registry.PrometheusRegistry to align with Prometheus client library v1.x API changes.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.why_exists: The class io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry was removed in prometheus-client-java v1.0.0, causing a compilation error (cannot find symbol) if not replaced.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Update registry usage from CollectorRegistry.defaultRegistry to PrometheusRegistry.defaultRegistry to match the new API.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.why_exists: The method register on the old CollectorRegistry class is no longer available or compatible with the new DropwizardExports constructor expectations in the updated library, leading to compilation errors.
